summary: Comprehensive testing of Audit System and Shared Data features completed successfully. All backend APIs working correctly (16/16 tests passed). Frontend audit page functional with proper display of logs, filters, and user names.

issues: Console warning about HTML nesting (<tr> inside <span>) - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/audit-logs returns logs with correct structure
Backend: Audit log contains user_id, user_name, user_email, action, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, details, created_at
Backend: Filter audit logs by entity_type (e.g., máquina)
Backend: Audit log actions are valid (criar, editar, excluir)
Backend: Creating a machine generates audit log with user_name
Backend: Editing a machine generates audit log with details of previous data
Backend: Deleting a machine generates audit log
Backend: Creating a maintenance generates audit log with value details
Backend: Creating an obra generates audit log
Backend: Creating a stock item generates audit log
Backend: User 2 can see data created by User 1 (shared system)
Backend: User 2 can see audit logs from User 1's actions
Backend: User 1 can see data created by User 2 with correct user_name in audit
Backend: All audit logs contain user_name and user_email
Frontend: Audit page loads correctly at /audit
Frontend: Audit logs displayed with user names (Test User, Test User 2)
Frontend: Action badges (Criar, Editar, Excluir) displayed with colors
Frontend: Entity type badges (máquina, manutenção, obra, item de estoque) displayed
Frontend: Search filter works for filtering by user name, entity name, details
Frontend: Entity type filter dropdown works
Frontend: Action filter dropdown works
Frontend: User email and timestamp displayed in each log entry
Frontend: Machines page shows all machines (shared data)
Frontend: Maintenances page shows all maintenances (shared data)
Frontend: Obras page shows all obras (shared data)
Frontend: Stock page shows all stock items (shared data)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: MaintenancesPage.jsx has HTML nesting warning (<tr> inside <span>) - cosmetic issue from React rendering
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing. Existing data in system: 5 machines, 4 maintenances, 2 obras, 3 stock items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit system fully implemented and tested. All CRUD operations (create, edit, delete) on machines, maintenances, obras, stock items, and categories generate audit logs with user_name. Shared data system working - all authenticated users see the same data. Audit page at /audit displays logs with filters by entity_type and action. Test credentials: test@test.com / password

audit_system.create_audit_log: Working - All CRUD operations call create_audit_log() with user info
audit_system.get_audit_logs: Working - GET /api/audit-logs returns logs with user_name, action, entity_type, entity_name, details
audit_system.user_name_tracking: Working - Each log shows the name of the employee who made the change

shared_data_system.machines: Working - All users see all machines regardless of who created them
shared_data_system.maintenances: Working - All users see all maintenances
shared_data_system.obras: Working - All users see all obras
shared_data_system.stock: Working - All users see all stock items
shared_data_system.categories: Working - All users see all categories

audit_page_ui.log_display: Working - Shows user name, action badge, entity type badge, entity name, details, email, timestamp
audit_page_ui.search_filter: Working - Filters by user name, entity name, details
audit_page_ui.type_filter: Working - Dropdown to filter by entity type
audit_page_ui.action_filter: Working - Dropdown to filter by action (Criar, Editar, Excluir)
